name: Mussels with Garlic Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the mussels in a heavy large Dutch oven and cover with cold water. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to medium-high and continue cooking until all mussels open (about 5 minutes). Carefully drain the mussels through a colander, reserving the liquid. Discard any mussels that do not open.
2. In the same Dutch oven, melt the butter over medium-high heat. Add the chopped shallots and minced garlic, and sauté until the shallots are tender (about 3 minutes).
3. Stir in the parsley, lemon juice, lemon peel, and reserved liquid from the mussels. Bring to a boil.
4. Season with pepper to taste. Spoon the garlic butter over the mussels and sprinkle with an additional tablespoon of chopped parsley.
5. Serve with soda bread for cleaning up any juices.
